title: stenostephanus citrinus
intro: Stenostephanus citrinus, also known as the yellow passionflower or passionflower vine, is a tropical plant species native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Stenostephanus citrinus include relief from anxiety and insomnia, as well as pain and inflammation reduction. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
